description: A clinic needs to call a patient and reschedule their appointment because the provider will be out of the office.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient's appointment that needs to be rescheduled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct appointment on the provider's schedule.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the existing appointment, noting 'Provider unavailable' as the reason.
Contact the patient, explain the situation, and find a new appointment time that works for them.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully communicates with the patient and books a new appointment.
